piec
  • GUIs
  • View page source

GUIs

PIEC provides Graphical User Interfaces (GUIs) for running common experiments interactively, without writing any code. They are a good starting point before moving to notebooks or scripted workflows.

Launching a GUI

GUIs live in the piec/guis/ directory of the repository. With PIEC installed, launch one from your terminal:

python path/to/piec/guis/gui_name.py

Note

Check the piec/guis/ directory for all available GUI files. Each file corresponds to a different experiment type.

Available GUIs

Todo

List each GUI file with a brief description of what experiment or task it handles.

Input Field Reference

Todo

For each GUI, document every input field: what it controls, what units it expects, and any constraints (e.g., allowed ranges, required formats). Group fields by GUI.
